name: dekshell

metadata.name: dekshell
metadata.summary: Being shell by mixing python and bash and cmd

documentation:
Being shell by mixing python and bash and cmd

### Before installing
```shell
# on debian
apt-get install -y libasound2-dev

# on fedora
dnf/yum install alsa-lib-devel
```

### After installing
```shell
# on windows
dekshell reg
```
